prestazioni: Engine swap to a **SR20DET Red Top (Version 3, 205hp stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 60 trim, 560hp capable)** paired with a **Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set (Type-R, 11.5mm lift)** and **JUN 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** for high-boost reliability.

Full **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** with a **custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system (SARD, 76mm piping, straight-through design)** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (set to 1.4 bar peak pressure)** for linear power delivery.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 20mm drop)** paired with **Cusco 22mm front sway bar (adjustable, 3-position)** and **Nismo 4.11:1 R200 differential (LSD, 2-way clutch-type)** for drift-specific tuning.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Type-3, 100mm extended fenders, carbon fiber overfenders)** with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (3D carbon, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord)** for aggressive stance and downforce.

**Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22 front / 17x10.5 +30 rear wheels (5x114.3, 73.1mm CB)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear)** for optimal grip and heat cycling.

**Custom front bumper lip (Seibon Carbon, 3D-scanned for R34 GT-R splitter integration)** with **Nismo S-Tune side skirts (OEM+ aggressive, bolt-on)** and **RE Amemiya rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-piece, 50mm ground clearance)** for aerodynamic balance.
